headline: This free Mac app reveals the truth about your mystery USB-C cables
summary: A new free Mac app helps identify the capabilities of USB-C cables. It replaces a discontinued $8 gadget that previously tested cable performance. The app is compatible with Macs featuring Apple Silicon chips.

headline: Social media limits are coming for teens across Europe
summary: The EU plans to impose new restrictions on social media access for children and teenagers. Proposals include age limits, outright bans, or phased access. Platforms may need to prove their services are not harmful to young users.

headline: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features
summary: Google is integrating its Gemini AI assistant into Waze for personalized trips. New AI features aim to enhance user experience and interaction with the app. Updates include improvements to Waze's conversation reporting feature.

headline: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
summary: Singer Lorde criticized AI glasses during a recent performance in Madrid. Her comments are likely aimed at festival sponsor Ray-Ban Meta smartglasses. She stated that such AI wearable technology is "not sexy."

headline: Daredevil and The Defenders' Madame Gao Actress Wai Ching Ho Dies Aged 83
summary: Wai Ching Ho, known for her role as Madame Gao in Marvel TV shows, has passed away. The acclaimed actress was 83 years old. She portrayed a memorable character in 'Daredevil' and 'The Defenders'.

headline: LA Noire Developer Considered Mad Men Star Jon Hamm for the Role of Cole Phelps, but Had a Very Good Reason for Going With Aaron Staton Instead
summary: Developers of LA Noire initially considered Jon Hamm for the role of Cole Phelps. They ultimately cast Aaron Staton, also from Mad Men. The decision was made for a specific and justified reason.

headline: LEGO Leak Reveals $200 Donkey Kong Arcade Cabinet
summary: Leaked information suggests LEGO will release a Donkey Kong Arcade Cabinet set. The rumored set is expected to cost $200. It is reportedly scheduled for release next month.

headline: Christopher Nolan Says Batman Helped Him Prepare for 'Irrelevant' Backlash to The Odyssey
summary: Christopher Nolan discussed "irrelevant" backlash for his upcoming film, The Odyssey. He stated his experience with Batman films prepared him for such criticism. Nolan is unfazed as The Odyssey approaches its release.

headline: Suspect in Ann Widdecombe murder seen on CCTV getting into car with object
summary: CCTV footage shows a suspect in the Ann Widdecombe murder case. The man was seen entering a red car in Rotherham. He appeared to be carrying an object.

headline: More than 2,700 people may have died in exceptional May and June heatwaves in England and Wales
summary: Over 2,700 deaths are linked to heatwaves in England and Wales during May and June. Most fatalities occurred during the June heatwave, which triggered a rare red heat alert. Experts are attributing these deaths to the exceptional temperatures.

headline: Heatwave to intensify in second week as wildfires burn across UK
summary: A UK heatwave is expected to intensify further in its second week. Many areas will experience increasing heat and humidity. Wildfires are currently burning across parts of the UK.

headline: UK seeking extradition of man suspected of killing wife and two daughters
summary: The UK is pursuing the extradition of a man suspected of murder. His wife and two daughters were found dead in Bedfordshire. Authorities are working to bring the suspect back to the UK.
